title: eriogonum abertianum var. lappulaceum
intro: Eriogonum abertianum var. lappulaceum, also known as Desert Sulphur Flower, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the Polygonaceae family. Its medicinal properties include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Desert Sulphur Flower include reduced inflammation and improved wound healing, as well as potential antiseptic and antifungal properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, salve, or tincture for topical use, and its roots can be harvested for medicinal purposes.
